subject: pira global oil and natural outlooks- save these dates.

emails.subject: PIRA Global Oil and Natural Outlooks- Save these dates.
emails.subject_base: PIRA Global Oil and Natural Outlooks- Save these dates.
emails.body: PIRA Global Oil and Natural Outlooks- Save these dates. PIRA is coming in May to do their semi-annual energy outlook. Greg Shuttlesworth- North American Natural Gas May 14th 3-5 pm (30 C1) New Production Outlook Price Direction Demand Fundamentals Dr. Gary Ross World Oil Outlook May 16th 7-8:30 am --32C2 OIl/ Demand/ supply Outlook Regional balances OPEC Rhetoric Jen Fraser 34759

emails.body: Re: PIRA Global Oil and Natural Outlooks- Save these dates. FYI Mike McConnell will be traveling on business during the week of May 14th and will be unable to attend. Thanks. Cathy for Mike McConnell From: Jennifer Fraser/ENRON@enronXgate on 04/20/2001 09:10 AM
